## Summary

Describe the proposed change.

## Checks

- [ ] No PerfectOne engine source or unapproved binaries are included.
- [ ] If the Windows beta CLI binary changed, the README and release notes explain it.
- [ ] No generated coverage artifacts are included.
- [ ] C beta behavior remains Docker-first and WSL-disabled.
- [ ] README or sample docs are updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] Release validation was run locally; this beta does not provide GitHub Actions verification.

Only the repository owner can approve and merge changes to protected branches.
